Name: Palak curry rice
Description: Hearty brown lentils served with Rice and sautéed Farm-Fresh Swiss Chard (Côte de Bette).

Name: Butter chicken
Description: Coastal-style prawns in a coconut milk gravy, served with Rice and a side of spring onion stir-fry.

Name: Jackfruit curry
Description: Tender chickpeas cooked in a spiced spinach gravy, served with Rice and a cooling Beetroot (Betterave) Raita.

Name: Salmon Curry
Description: Succulent chicken simmered in a smooth spinach sauce, served with Rice and Beetroot Raita.

Name: Soya Chunks Vindaloo
Description: Golden split chickpeas tempered with spices, served with Rice and Pan-fried Aubergines (Eggplant).

Name: Lamb Vindaloo
Description: Northeast Indian aromatic specialty served with Jeera Rice and spring onion stir-fry.

Name: Tofu Palak Dosa
Description: A tangy, vegetable-rich chickpea flour curry, served with Rice and a crisp seasonal salad.

Name: Egg Dosa
Description: Crispy fermented crepes layered with spiced egg. Served with Sambhar and Chutney.

Name: Chicken Dosa
Description: Classic roasted chicken marinated in yogurt and spices, served with savory Tomato Rice and a farm-fresh salad.

Name: Mango Pannacotta
Description: Traditional Indian ice cream with mango.

Name: Bhanavla
Description: Aromatic sweet dish with split yellow moong lentils, sugar and ghee.

Name: Bhajiya
Description: Dessert made from millet

Name: Our café will be closed on Worker's Day
Aloo Paratha
Description: Flatbread with Potato stuffing.

Name: Sev Puri
Description: Flat crunchy crackers topped with diced vegetables, tangy chutneys, and a mountain of fine crispy sev.

Name: Dahi Puri
Description: Crispy hollow shells filled with spiced potatoes and topped with chilled, creamy yogurt and tangy chutneys.
